description.para: The full color information is spread over multiple pixels.
When the format includes more than 8-bit per pixel, a strategy becomes needed to pack the bits over multiple bytes, as illustrated for each format.
The number above the 'R', 'r', 'G', 'g', 'B', 'b' are hints about which pixel number the following bits belong to.

briefdescription.para: Repeat a macro for every Bayer format, passed as first parameter.
Repeat a macro for every Bayer padded format, passed as first parameter.
8-bit bayer format, split in two 4-bit blocks each zero-padded, little endian.
8-bit bayer format, split in two 4-bit blocks each zero-padded, little endian.
8-bit bayer format, split in two 4-bit blocks each zero-padded, little endian.
8-bit bayer format, split in two 4-bit blocks each zero-padded, little endian.

memberdef.name: VIDEO_FOREACH_BAYER_MIPI_PACKED
memberdef.initializer: X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_SBGGR10P, __VA_ARGS__) \ X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_SGBRG10P, __VA_ARGS__) \ X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_SGRBG10P, __VA_ARGS__) \ X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_SRGGB10P, __VA_ARGS__) \ X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_SBGGR12P, __VA_ARGS__) \ X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_SGBRG12P, __VA_ARGS__) \ X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_SGRBG12P, __VA_ARGS__) \ X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_SRGGB12P, __VA_ARGS__) \ X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_SBGGR14P, __VA_ARGS__) \ X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_SGBRG14P, __VA_ARGS__) \ X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_SGRBG14P, __VA_ARGS__) \ X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_SRGGB14P, __VA_ARGS__)

briefdescription.para: Repeat a macro for every Bayer MIPI-packed format, passed as first parameter.

detaileddescription.para: A red, green, blue channel for every pixel, other than 8-bit per pixel.

memberdef.name: VIDEO_FOREACH_BAYER_NON_PACKED
memberdef.initializer: X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_SBGGR8, __VA_ARGS__) \ X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_SGBRG8, __VA_ARGS__) \ X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_SGRBG8, __VA_ARGS__) \ X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_SRGGB8, __VA_ARGS__) \ X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_SGBRG10, __VA_ARGS__) \ X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_SGRBG10, __VA_ARGS__) \ X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_SRGGB10, __VA_ARGS__) \ X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_SBGGR12, __VA_ARGS__) \ X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_SGBRG12, __VA_ARGS__) \ X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_SGRBG12, __VA_ARGS__) \ X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_SRGGB12, __VA_ARGS__) \ X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_SBGGR14, __VA_ARGS__) \ X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_SGBRG14, __VA_ARGS__) \ X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_SGRBG14, __VA_ARGS__) \ X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_SRGGB14, __VA_ARGS__) \ X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_SBGGR16, __VA_ARGS__) \ X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_SGBRG16, __VA_ARGS__) \ X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_SGRBG16, __VA_ARGS__) \ X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_SRGGB16, __VA_ARGS__)

briefdescription.para: Repeat a macro for every Bayer non-packed format, passed as first parameter.

detaileddescription.para: A red, green, blue channel for every pixel, other than 8-bit per pixel.

description.para: Luminance (Y) channel only, in various bit depth and packing.
When the format includes more than 8-bit per pixel, a strategy becomes needed to pack the bits over multiple bytes, as illustrated for each format.
The number above the 'Y', 'y' are hints about which pixel number the following bits belong to.

briefdescription.para: Repeat a macro for every grayscale format, passed as first parameter.
Repeat a macro for every grayscale non-packed format, passed as first parameter.

detaileddescription.para: A red, green, blue channel for every pixel, other than 8-bit per pixel.

briefdescription.para: Same as Y8 (8-bit luma-only) following the standard FOURCC naming, or L8 in some graphics libraries.
Little endian, with the 6 most significant bits set to Zero.
Little endian, with the 4 most significant bits set to Zero.
Little endian, with the 2 most significant bits set to Zero.
Little endian.
Repeat a macro for every grayscale padded format, passed as first parameter.
8-bit luma-only split in two 4-bit blocks each zero-padded, little endian.
Repeat a macro for every grayscale MIPI-packed format, passed as first parameter.
Repeat a macro for every RGB format, passed as first parameter.
Repeat a macro for every RGB packed format, passed as first parameter.

detaileddescription.para: A red, green, blue channel for every pixel, other than 8-bit per pixel.

briefdescription.para: 5 red bits [15:11], 6 green bits [10:5], 5 blue bits [4:0].

detaileddescription.para: This 16-bit integer is then packed in big endian format over two bytes:

briefdescription.para: 5 red bits [15:11], 6 green bits [10:5], 5 blue bits [4:0].

detaileddescription.para: This 16-bit integer is then packed in little endian format over two bytes:

briefdescription.para: Repeat a macro for every RGB non-packed format, passed as first parameter.

detaileddescription.para: A red, green, blue channel for every pixel, 8-bit per pixel.

briefdescription.para: 24 bit RGB format with 8 bit per component
24 bit RGB format with 8 bit per component
Repeat a macro for every RGB alpha format, passed as first parameter.

detaileddescription.para: A red, green, blue, alpha channel for every pixel.

briefdescription.para: The first byte is alpha (A) for each pixel.
The last byte is alpha (A) for each pixel.

simplesect.para: Linux calls this format ABGR32 due to a historical typo

briefdescription.para: The last byte is alpha (A) for each pixel.
The first byte is alpha (A) for each pixel.

simplesect.para: Linux calls this format BGRA32 due to a historical typo

briefdescription.para: Repeat a macro for every RGB padded format, passed as first parameter.

detaileddescription.para: A red, green, blue channel for every pixel.

briefdescription.para: The first byte is empty (X) for each pixel.
The first byte is empty (X) for each pixel.

simplesect.para: Linux calls this format BGRX32 due to a historical typo

briefdescription.para: The last byte is empty (X) for each pixel.

simplesect.para: Linux calls this format XBGR32 due to a historical typo

briefdescription.para: The last byte is empty (X) for each pixel.
Repeat a macro for every YUV format, passed as first parameter.

memberdef.name: VIDEO_FOREACH_YUV_NON_PLANAR
memberdef.initializer: X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_YUYV, __VA_ARGS__) \ X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_YVYU, __VA_ARGS__) \ X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_VYUY, __VA_ARGS__) \ X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_UYVY, __VA_ARGS__) \ X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_YUV24, __VA_ARGS__) \ X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_XYUV32, __VA_ARGS__)

briefdescription.para: Repeat a macro for every YUV Non-Planar format, passed as first parameter.
There is either a missing channel per pixel, U or V.

detaileddescription.para: The value is to be averaged over 2 pixels to get the value of individual pixel.

briefdescription.para: The first byte is empty (X) for each pixel.
24 bit YUV format with 8 bit per component

memberdef.name: VIDEO_FOREACH_YUV_SEMI_PLANAR
memberdef.initializer: X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_NV12, __VA_ARGS__) \ X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_NV21, __VA_ARGS__) \ X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_NV16, __VA_ARGS__) \ X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_NV61, __VA_ARGS__) \ X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_NV24, __VA_ARGS__) \ X(VIDEO_PIX_FMT_NV42, __VA_ARGS__)

briefdescription.para: Repeat a macro for every YUV Semi-Planar format, passed as first parameter.
Chroma (U/V) are subsampled horizontaly and vertically.

detaileddescription.para: Below diagram show how luma and chroma relate to each others

briefdescription.para: Chroma (U/V) are subsampled horizontaly and vertically.

detaileddescription.para: Below diagram show how luma and chroma relate to each others

briefdescription.para: Chroma (U/V) are subsampled horizontaly.

detaileddescription.para: Below diagram show how luma and chroma relate to each others

briefdescription.para: Chroma (U/V) are subsampled horizontaly.

detaileddescription.para: Below diagram show how luma and chroma relate to each others

briefdescription.para: Chroma (U/V) are not subsampled.

detaileddescription.para: Below diagram show how luma and chroma relate to each others

briefdescription.para: Chroma (U/V) are not subsampled.

detaileddescription.para: Below diagram show how luma and chroma relate to each others

briefdescription.para: Repeat a macro for every YUV Full-Planar format, passed as first parameter.
Chroma (U/V) are subsampled horizontaly and vertically.

detaileddescription.para: Below diagram show how luma and chroma relate to each others

briefdescription.para: Chroma (U/V) are subsampled horizontaly and vertically.

detaileddescription.para: Below diagram show how luma and chroma relate to each others

briefdescription.para: Repeat a macro for every compressed format, passed as first parameter.
Both JPEG (single frame) and Motion-JPEG (MJPEG, multiple JPEG frames concatenated)
H264 with start code.
H264 without start code.
PNG.
Get number of bits per pixel of a pixel format.

parameterdescription.para: FourCC pixel format value (Video pixel formats).
if the format is unhandled or if it is variable number of bits
bit size of one pixel for this format

briefdescription.para: Four-character-code uniquely identifying the pixel format.
Convert a four-character-string to a four-character-code.

detaileddescription.para: Convert a string literal or variable into a four-character-code as defined by VIDEO_FOURCC.

briefdescription.para: Convert a four-character-code to a four-character-string.

detaileddescription.para: Convert a four-character code as defined by VIDEO_FOURCC into a string that can be used anywhere, such as in debug logs with the s print formatter.

parameterdescription.para: The 32-bit four-character-code integer to be converted, in CPU-native endinaness.

briefdescription.para: Test if a fourcc is a grayscale format.

parameterdescription.para: FourCC of the pixel format to test

simplesect.para: Whether the format is known to match this category

briefdescription.para: Test if a fourcc is a Bayer format.

parameterdescription.para: FourCC of the pixel format to test

simplesect.para: Whether the format is known to match this category

briefdescription.para: Test if a fourcc is an RGB format (bayer excluded)

parameterdescription.para: FourCC of the pixel format to test

simplesect.para: Whether the format is known to match this category

briefdescription.para: Test if a fourcc is an YUV format.

parameterdescription.para: FourCC of the pixel format to test

simplesect.para: Whether the format is known to match this category

briefdescription.para: Test if a fourcc is any of the MIPI-packed formats.

parameterdescription.para: FourCC of the pixel format to test

simplesect.para: Whether the format is known to match this category

briefdescription.para: Test if a fourcc is any of the MIPI-packed formats.

parameterdescription.para: FourCC of the pixel format to test

simplesect.para: Whether the format is known to match this category

briefdescription.para: Test if a fourcc is any of the semi-planar formats.

parameterdescription.para: FourCC of the pixel format to test

simplesect.para: Whether the format is known to match this category

briefdescription.para: Test if a fourcc is any of the full-planar formats.

parameterdescription.para: FourCC of the pixel format to test

simplesect.para: Whether the format is known to match this category

briefdescription.para: The '|' characters separate the pixels or logical blocks, and spaces separate the bytes.

detaileddescription.para: The uppercase letter represents the most significant bit. The lowercase letters represent the rest of the bits.
